name: Maria Santos
bio: Former Governor of Arizona and Harvard Law graduate. Known for bipartisan immigration reform and expanding Medicaid in her state. Ran a successful small business before entering politics.

name: James Crawford
bio: U.S. Senator from Texas and former Army Colonel. Champions fiscal conservatism and strong national defense. Led bipartisan veterans' healthcare legislation.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Tech entrepreneur turned Senator from California. Pioneered AI governance legislation and champions climate action. First-generation immigrant who built a billion-dollar clean energy startup.

name: Robert Mitchell
bio: Two-term Senator from Ohio. Former steel industry executive focused on manufacturing jobs and trade policy. Known as a moderate Republican willing to cross party lines.

name: Angela Washington
bio: Ohio State Representative and former public school teacher. Advocates for education funding, healthcare access, and criminal justice reform. Endorsed by major teachers' unions.

name: David Chen
bio: Philadelphia City Councilmember and community organizer. Son of immigrants, he focuses on affordable housing, workers' rights, and environmental justice in urban communities.

name: Sarah Thornton
bio: Former U.S. Attorney and anti-corruption advocate. Focused on law enforcement, border security, and reducing government waste. Popular among suburban moderate voters.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Three-term Congressman from Atlanta. Civil rights attorney who has championed voting rights legislation and police reform. Serves on the Judiciary Committee.

name: Lisa Kowalski
bio: Small business owner and former city council member from Grand Rapids. Runs on economic growth, school choice, and Second Amendment rights. Known for her town hall accessibility.

name: Carlos Rivera
bio: Tucson school board president and former Marine. Focuses on veterans' issues, border community development, and education. Bilingual advocate for immigrant families.

name: Jennifer Park
bio: Emergency room physician from Tampa. Running on healthcare affordability, climate resilience for coastal communities, and gun violence prevention. First-time candidate.

name: William Hayes
bio: Two-term Congressman and former real estate developer. Prioritizes tax cuts, deregulation, and strong border security. Serves on the Financial Services Committee.
